name_cn:
CHANEL 22 Bag Medium Beige💕
Smooth glossy calfskin with clear leather creases
Aged metal, 3D Logo, classic black and gold color scheme!
Top drawstring double chain design connects the lower single chain with double C Logo, with a small 'lug' on the bottom left and right fixed with a Logo 'rivet', inside there is a zip pocket and a key chain for keys and small items...combining simplicity and comfort to pack your entire spring🍃
Dimensions: 39*42*8cm
